particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery including 14 harriot drive, heathcote industrial estate, warwick, warwickshire and fullready poultry farm, fullready, ettington, stratford see image for full details.
